title: River Towns Road Trip: Exploring the Caloosahatchee Corridor
excerpt: From LaBelle's old-Florida charm to Alva's riverside tranquility, discover the scenic small towns strung along the Caloosahatchee River — best explored with your own set of wheels.
igCaption:
River Towns Road Trip: Exploring the Caloosahatchee Corridor

From LaBelle's old-Florida charm to Alva's riverside tranquility, discover the scenic small towns strung along the Caloosahatchee River — best explored with your own set of wheels.
